overview: UR COMICS is a high-performance Webtoon/Manhwa ecosystem with a Midnight Purple visual identity. Creators upload vertical comic chapters through a 4-step studio wizard with atomic publish guarantees. Readers enjoy a virtualized vertical scrolling reader with smart bookmarking that resumes exactly where they left off.
features: Midnight Purple dark gradient UI with glassmorphism navigation
4-step Creator Studio with 9:16 thumbnail cropper, drag-drop image upload, and atomic DRAFT→PUBLISHED pipeline
Virtualized vertical webtoon reader with Stitch & Stretch seamless canvas and read-position memory
Intelligent sidebar with Home, Trending (Hot Score algorithm), and Continue Reading smart bookmarks
FAQ system with tag filtering and real-time keyword search
User profiles with Creator Badge auto-awarded on first publish
Two-phase commit upload with exponential backoff retry and full rollback on failure
